nasb.text: But I will settle him in My house and in My kingdom forever, and his throne shall be established forever.” ’ ”

esv.text: but I will confirm him in my house and in my kingdom forever, and his throne shall be established forever.’”

cnv.text: 我卻要把他堅立在我的家裡和我的國裡，直到永遠；他的王位必永遠堅立。’”

ccb.text: 我要使他永远治理我的家和我的国。他的王位必永远稳固。’”
